diagrams.title: Stack Operations Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows how push and pop work in a stack with array implementation
elements: Top pointer pointing to top element
Push: top++, add element at top index
Pop: remove element at top, top--
diagrams.purpose: Understanding LIFO behavior and overflow/underflow conditions

diagrams.title: Queue Operations Visualization
diagrams.description: Depicts linear queue with front and rear pointers
elements: Enqueue: add at rear position, increment rear
Dequeue: remove from front position, increment front
Shows space wastage in linear queue
diagrams.purpose: Understanding FIFO behavior and queue overflow/underflow

diagrams.title: Circular Queue Wrap-around
diagrams.description: Illustrates how circular queue wraps around using modular arithmetic
elements: Shows empty condition: front == rear == -1 or after reset
diagrams.purpose: Understanding circular queue implementation and space reuse

diagrams.title: Infix to Postfix Conversion Steps
diagrams.description: Shows step-by-step conversion of A + B * C to postfix
diagrams.purpose: Understanding operator precedence and stack usage in conversion
